Run your day with clarity and control.

Manage rooms, staff, tasks and performance in one connected workflow. Plan the shift, balance assignments, verify standards and preserve the operational record.

New to this tool?

Watch the short overview before setting up your property.

How the sections work together

Complete Hotel setup before first use. During a normal day, move through the operational sections from planning to saved records and performance review.

BEFORE FIRST USE
Hotel setupCreate rooms, room types, standard times, staff, tasks and common areas. Return here only when hotel information changes.
→
NORMAL DAILY WORKFLOW
Morning planSelect staff on shift and today's room services and priorities.
→
Room boardReview the full workload, priorities, assignments and progress.
→
AssignmentsAuto-assign or adjust work, then print or email assignment sheets.
→
ChecklistsUse the relevant checklist to verify completed work and archive it.
→
Shift historyEnter actual finish times and save the completed daily record.
→
ProductivityReview expected versus actual hours and longer-term performance.
WHAT'S IN THIS BUNDLE
1
Hotel setupCreate and maintain the hotel details, room inventory, service-time matrix, staff list, task library and common areas used by all other sections.
2
Morning planSelect who is on shift, choose the service required for each room and set today's priorities before assignments are created.
3
Room boardSee today's active rooms, services, workload, priorities, assignments and completion status in one operational view.
4
AssignmentsAuto-assign or manually balance rooms and additional work, then print or email sheets and record each housekeeper's actual finish time.
5
ChecklistsOpen the appropriate checkout, stayover or inspection checklist, verify completed work and archive the completed checklist.
6
Shift historySave the completed shift, review previous daily records and export the operational history when required.
7
ProductivityUse saved shift data to compare expected and actual hours, review overhour percentages and monitor performance over time.
☁
Protect your operational dataBrowser storage stays on this device. Use Backup before changing browser or device, and Restore to load that saved file elsewhere.

SAVE TO HISTORY ★ PRO FEATURE
Save today's complete shift snapshot to the 90-day history. Includes all rooms, assignments, and staff capacity data.
ASSIGNMENT SHEET · Use the print options above to create either today's consolidated assignment or individual staff sheets.
HOTEL MASTERY HUB · HSK SHIFT PLANNER PRO
Shift History 90 DAYS
Shifts saved from the Assignment Sheet tab. Rolls automatically — entries older than 90 days are removed.
PRODUCTIVITY BUILDS UP AUTOMATICALLY
Every shift saved to this history feeds Productivity's Room Hrs and Task Hrs automatically for whatever month you're viewing there — no export step. Save a shift here, then check Productivity whenever you want the month's real numbers so far.
No shifts saved yet
After completing a shift, go to the Assignment Sheet tab and click SAVE TODAY TO HISTORY.

HISTORY
REPORTING PERIODCurrent period

Staff Data

One row per housekeeper currently in Setup. Diff % calculates automatically.

SHOWING
Expected Hrs is the standard target time for everything assigned that day (rooms + tasks + common areas, at their default minutes) — computed automatically, not typed in. Room Hrs is the real time, from each person's sign-off actual finish time on Assignment Sheet; until sign-off is filled in for a day, it falls back to the standard estimate. All of this builds up automatically as shifts are saved to history for the month/year set in Setup — no export needed. To add or remove staff, use Setup's Staff List; this table follows it automatically. Flag new staff as N and volunteers as V — their hours are tracked but excluded from the adjusted KPI so training drag does not skew your core team results.
STAFF NAME EXPECTED HRS ROOM HRS TASK HRS DIFF HRS DIFF % FLAG (N/V) COMMENT
No staff showing? Add them in Setup →
